text: Iran's Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf had impressed the American team as a “refined and professional bargainer, and potential leader of a new Iran.” Source: David Ignatius, WaPo
text_zh: 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫给美国团队留下了深刻印象，称他是一位“精明且专业的谈判者，也是新伊朗的潜在领导人。” 来源：大卫·伊格内修斯，《华盛顿邮报》

text: Washington Post Columnist David Ignatius: The blockade is a pressure tactic, to be sure, but not primarily a military one. Trump has no appetite for further armed conflict. He knows that the upsides are limited and the ‘tail risk’ is large. A ground attack… might lead the U.S. into a quagmire.
text_zh: 《华盛顿邮报》专栏作家大卫·伊格内修斯：封锁无疑是一种施压策略，但主要不是军事手段。特朗普无意进行进一步的武装冲突。他知道上行空间有限，而“尾部风险”巨大。地面进攻……可能会将美国拖入泥潭。

text: Iran's First Deputy Speaker of Parliament Ali Nikzad: They had not come to take [rescue] a pilot. They had come to take something else; to take it and put it on display.
text_zh: 伊朗议会第一副议长阿里·尼克扎德：他们不是来营救飞行员的。他们是来拿别的东西的；拿走它并进行展示。

text: Open Source Intel A senior Pakistani Foreign Ministry source told Qatar's Al-Arabi Al-Jadid that Pakistani officials are working to convince the U.S. delegation to return to negotiations with Iran. Talks between Pakistani officials and both the Iranian and American delegations took place in "a positive atmosphere," with both sides still interested in dialogue. Pakistani FM Ishaq Dar spoke with his Saudi, Turkish, and Egyptian counterparts to coordinate efforts to maintain the ceasefire and reduce tensions. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位巴基斯坦外交部高级消息人士告诉卡塔尔《新阿拉伯人报》，巴基斯坦官员正努力说服美国代表团重返与伊朗的谈判。巴基斯坦官员与伊朗和美国代表团之间的会谈在“积极的氛围”中进行，双方仍对对话感兴趣。巴基斯坦外交部长伊沙克·达尔与沙特、土耳其和埃及同行进行了交谈，以协调努力维持停火并降低紧张局势。推文

text: Open Source Intel Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: "I have no fear. I am willing to give my life for the Revolution. Removing one person will not solve anything. There are hundreds ready to assume responsibility." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590833379700868/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：“我没有恐惧。我愿意为革命献出生命。除掉一个人解决不了任何问题。有数百人准备承担责任。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590833379700868/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Cuban President Díaz-Canel responding to Trump's invasion threats: "Whoever tries to take over Cuba will collect her blood-soaked soil if he does not perish in the struggle." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590499345261050/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：古巴总统迪亚斯-卡内尔回应特朗普的入侵威胁：“任何试图占领古巴的人，如果不在斗争中丧生，就将收敛她那浸透鲜血的土地。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590499345261050/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump says a blockade is set to take effect as countries move to restrict Iran’s oil exports, adding tankers are rerouting to the U.S.: "At 10 o'clock tomorrow we have a blockade going into effect...other nations are working so that Iran will not be able to sell oil and that would be very effective!" "There are MANY boats heading toward our country to fill up with oil and then go and take it, so they're not going to go through the Hormuz strait and ultimately that'll be corrected." "But in the meantime, they're using us!" "We have more oil because of Drill Baby Drill, we have more oil than Russia and Saudi Arabia put together." "So if you look at Russia and Saudi Arabia, two big ones, we have much more oil than they have put together. And what's happening is boats are coming over here, filling up, we don't have to go through the Hormuz strait!" tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：特朗普表示，随着各国采取行动限制伊朗石油出口，封锁措施即将生效，并补充说油轮正在改道前往美国：“明天10点，我们将实施封锁……其他国家正在努力，使伊朗无法出售石油，这将非常有效！”“有许多船只正驶向我国装载石油，然后运走，所以它们不会经过霍尔木兹海峡，最终问题会得到纠正。”“但在此期间，他们正在利用我们！”“由于‘钻探吧，宝贝，钻探吧’政策，我们拥有的石油比俄罗斯和沙特加起来还要多。”“所以如果你看看俄罗斯和沙特这两个大国，我们拥有的石油比他们加起来还要多。发生的情况是，船只正来到这里装载，我们不必经过霍尔木兹海峡！”推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The spokesperson for Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters says security in the Gulf and Sea of Oman “is either for everyone or no one.” He warns that vessels linked to Iran’s enemies will be barred from the Strait of Hormuz, adding that any threats to Iranian ports would place all regional ports at risk. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人表示，波斯湾和阿曼湾的安全“要么属于所有人，要么谁也不属于”。他警告说，与伊朗敌人有关联的船只将被禁止通过霍尔木兹海峡，并补充说，任何对伊朗港口的威胁都将使所有地区港口处于危险之中。@wfwitness

text: Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ Spokesperson: Security of ports in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman is either for everyone or for no one. Enemy-affiliated vessels do not and will not have the right to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. Other vessels will be allowed to transit the strait in compliance with the regulations of the Armed Forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran. If the security of ports of the Islamic Republic of Iran is threatened, no port in the Persian Gulf or the Sea of Oman will remain safe.
text_zh: 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人：波斯湾和阿曼湾港口的安全要么属于所有人，要么谁也不属于。与敌人有关联的船只没有，将来也不会有权通过霍尔木兹海峡。其他船只在遵守伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队规定的情况下，将被允许通过海峡。如果伊朗伊斯兰共和国的港口安全受到威胁，波斯湾或阿曼湾将没有任何港口保持安全。

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: I have no fear. I am willing to give my life for the Revolution. Removing one person will not solve anything. There are hundreds ready to assume responsibility.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：我没有恐惧。我愿意为革命献出生命。除掉一个人解决不了任何问题。有数百人准备承担责任。

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: If the time comes, we’ll defend ourselves. And if we need to die, we’ll die.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：如果时机到来，我们将保卫自己。如果我们需要牺牲，我们就会牺牲。

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel on Trump's invasion threats over Cuba: Whoever tries to take over Cuba will collect her blood-soaked soil if he does not perish in the struggle.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔谈及特朗普对古巴的入侵威胁：任何试图占领古巴的人，如果不在斗争中丧生，就将收敛她那浸透鲜血的土地。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 "Security of ports in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman is either for everyone or for no one" Lieutenant Colonel Ebrahim Zolfaghari, spokesperson for Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters issued a statement as the US Central Command (CENTCOM) prepared to enforce the blockade starting at 10 a.m. ET: -- Iran’s armed forces view defending national sovereignty in its territorial waters as a “natural and legal duty.” -- Vessels “affiliated with the enemy” will not be permitted to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, while other ships may transit if they comply with Iranian regulations. -- Due to ongoing “enemy threats,” Iran will maintain a permanent mechanism for controlling the strait even after any conflict. -- The US restrictions on maritime movement are “illegal” and an act of “piracy.” Warning: If the security of the ports of the Islamic Republic of Iran… is threatened, then no port in the Persian Gulf or the Sea of Oman will remain safe.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 “波斯湾和阿曼湾港口的安全要么属于所有人，要么谁也不属于。”伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人易卜拉欣·佐尔法加里中校发表声明，此时美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）正准备在美东时间上午10点实施封锁：-- 伊朗武装部队将捍卫其领海内的国家主权视为“自然和法律义务”。-- “与敌人有关联”的船只将不被允许通过霍尔木兹海峡，而其他船只若遵守伊朗规定则可通行。-- 由于持续的“敌人威胁”，即使在任何冲突之后，伊朗也将维持一个控制海峡的永久机制。-- 美国对海上交通的限制是“非法的”，是一种“海盗行为”。警告：如果伊朗伊斯兰共和国的港口安全……受到威胁，那么波斯湾或阿曼湾将没有任何港口保持安全。

text: Nuno Felix RT @elikowaz : Orban is gone. His successor is a former Fidesz insider and isn’t hostile to Israel. But he’s committed to EU reintegration — and for the Netanyahu government, that’s the whole problem. 1/5 https://twitter.com/elikowaz/status/2043539919457395022/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @elikowaz：欧尔班下台了。他的继任者是前青民盟内部人士，对以色列并不敌对。但他致力于欧盟重新整合——对于内塔尼亚胡政府来说，这才是整个问题所在。1/5 https://twitter.com/elikowaz/status/2043539919457395022/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Saudi Arabia's crude oil sales to China expected to drop by half next month as the Middle East war disrupts flows and drives up prices. - Bloomberg tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：由于中东战争扰乱了石油流动并推高了价格，沙特阿拉伯下个月对中国的原油销售预计将减半。- 彭博社 推文

text: WarMonitor Ships are not “headed to our country.” They’re avoiding Hormuz, turning around, or just waiting it out. This is disruption, not some instant reroute, and it only shows how fragile the system really is. Trump: We have more oil than Russia and Saudi Arabia put together. Boats are heading to our country empty and will go back full of oil so they do not have to go through Hormuz. They are using us for now, but ultimately that will be corrected. 1/ https://twitter.com/Mylovanov/status/2043567823910269371/video/1 - Tymofiy Mylovanov tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：船只并没有“驶向我国”。它们是在避开霍尔木兹海峡，掉头，或者只是在等待。这是一种干扰，而不是什么即时的改道，这只会显示出系统是多么脆弱。特朗普：我们拥有的石油比俄罗斯和沙特加起来还要多。船只正空着驶向我国，然后装满石油回去，这样它们就不必经过霍尔木兹海峡。它们现在正在利用我们，但最终这会得到纠正。1/ https://twitter.com/Mylovanov/status/2043567823910269371/video/1 - Tymofiy Mylovanov 推文

text: Visioner 🇭🇺 Péter Márki-Zay, in an effort to improve relations with Brussels, is unblocking the allocation of a €90 billion loan to Ukraine — Politico. 🔹 At the same time, the future prime minister stated during the pre-election campaign that he opposes supplying Hungarian weapons or finances to Kyiv, and also opposes accelerating Ukraine's accession process to the European Union. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇭🇺 彼得·马尔基-扎伊为了改善与布鲁塞尔的关系，正在解除对乌克兰900亿欧元贷款的分配限制——Politico。🔹 同时，这位未来的总理在竞选期间表示，他反对向基辅提供匈牙利武器或资金，也反对加速乌克兰加入欧盟的进程。推文

President DJT" - President Trump via Truth Social. The American blockade on the Strait of Hormuz, in addition to the Iranian blockade, will begin in seven and a half hours. tweet

He's really put himself into a corner over the last few weeks that's going to be very hard to get out of. https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2043562388721373480/video/1 tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 Indonesia says it is in talks with the United States over a potential agreement to grant U.S. military aircraft access to its airspace, though no deal has been finalized. U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is expected to meet Indonesian Defense Minister Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin later Monday for further discussions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 印度尼西亚表示，正在与美国就一项潜在协议进行谈判，以允许美国军用飞机进入其领空，尽管尚未达成最终协议。预计美国国防部长皮特·海格塞斯将于周一晚些时候会见印尼国防部长沙弗里·沙姆苏丁进行进一步讨论。@wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 Peter Magyar, who won the elections in Hungary, announced that he would negotiate with Putin - in particular, about energy supplies. "We will have to sit down at the negotiating table with the Russian president. The geographical position of neither Russia nor Hungary will change. Our energy dependence on Russia will also remain. We will negotiate" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 在匈牙利选举中获胜的彼得·马扎尔宣布，他将与普京进行谈判——特别是关于能源供应的问题。“我们将不得不与俄罗斯总统坐到谈判桌前。俄罗斯和匈牙利的地理位置都不会改变。我们对俄罗斯的能源依赖也将持续。我们将进行谈判” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Zionist Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich released a preliminary estimate stating that the direct budgetary costs of Operation Roaring Lion -- amounted to approximately NIS 35 billion (about $11.5 billion at current exchange rates)
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 犹太复国主义财政部长比撒列·斯莫特里赫发布了一份初步估计，称“咆哮狮子”行动的直接预算成本约为350亿新谢克尔（按当前汇率计算约为115亿美元）

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State Antony Blinken on enrichment: It’s not clear whether the folks we had at the table fully grasp what they were getting from the Iranians.
text_zh: 美国前国务卿安东尼·布林肯谈及浓缩铀：目前还不清楚我们在谈判桌上的人是否完全理解他们从伊朗人那里得到了什么。

text: 🇮🇹 / 🇵🇸 🔻 Italian magazine L'Espresso's cover image: "THE ABUSE The annexation of the West Bank, with soldiers complicit with the settlers. Gaza annihilated. The advance into Lebanon. The border breached in Syria. The war on Iran. Ethnic cleansing and massacres. This is how the Zionist right is shaping Greater Israel". @AlHaqNews
text_zh: 🇮🇹 / 🇵🇸 🔻 意大利杂志《L'Espresso》封面图片：“滥用：吞并西岸，士兵与定居者同流合污。加沙被歼灭。向黎巴嫩推进。叙利亚边境被突破。对伊朗的战争。种族清洗和大屠杀。这就是犹太复国主义右翼塑造大以色列的方式”。@AlHaqNews

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 Australia has appointed Lieutenant General Susan Coyle as Chief of Army, marking the first time a woman will lead the army in its history. She is set to take the role in July, replacing Lieutenant General Simon Stuart. The appointment comes amid broader defence leadership changes and efforts to increase female representation within the armed forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 澳大利亚任命苏珊·科伊尔中将为陆军参谋长，这是该国历史上首次由女性领导陆军。她将于7月接替西蒙·斯图尔特中将。此次任命是在更广泛的国防领导层变动以及增加武装部队中女性代表比例的努力背景下进行的。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal: "The 25th Amendment, impeachment, demanding his resignation -- we need to do whatever it takes to remove Trump from office"
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 国会女议员普拉米拉·贾亚帕尔：“第25修正案、弹劾、要求他辞职——我们需要不惜一切代价将特朗普赶下台”

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State Antony Blinken: President Trump has taken an off-ramp. Maybe he was tired of all that winning. He's really put himself into a corner over the last few weeks that's going to be very hard to get out of.
text_zh: 美国前国务卿安东尼·布林肯：特朗普总统已经采取了退出策略。也许他厌倦了所有的胜利。在过去的几周里，他确实把自己逼入了一个很难脱身的死胡同。

text: Trump on Iran: I don’t care if they come back or not. If they don’t come back, I’m fine.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：我不在乎他们是否回来。如果他们不回来，我没意见。

text: Reporter: Why did you attack Pope Leo? Trump: I don’t think he’s doing a very good job. He likes crime, I guess. We don’t like a pope who says it’s ok to have a nuclear weapon. We don’t want a pope that says crime is ok. I am not a big fan of Pope Leo.
text_zh: 记者：你为什么要攻击利奥教皇？特朗普：我不认为他做得很好。我想他喜欢犯罪。我们不喜欢一个说拥有核武器没问题的教皇。我们不想要一个说犯罪没问题的教皇。我不是利奥教皇的忠实粉丝。

text: 🇺🇸 So the “Trump Jesus” post was already made on February 4 by Nick Adams, whom Trump appointed as Special Presidential Envoy for American Tourism, Exceptionalism, and Values. The only difference is that in Nick’s post, the “angel soldier” above Trump looks “normal” (as much as AI slop can look normal), while in Trump’s post it looks more like some “AI demon.” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 所以那个“特朗普耶稣”的帖子早在2月4日就由尼克·亚当斯发布了，特朗普任命他为美国旅游、例外论和价值观总统特别代表。唯一的区别是，在尼克的帖子里，特朗普上方的“天使士兵”看起来很“正常”（只要AI垃圾看起来能正常的话），而在特朗普的帖子里，它看起来更像是一个“AI恶魔”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: Iran is in very bad shape. I think they’re very desperate.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗的情况非常糟糕。我认为他们非常绝望。

text: Reporter: How is the ceasefire holding? Trump: It is holding well.
text_zh: 记者：停火协议执行得如何？特朗普：执行得很好。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Alright 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 好吧 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump posts image portraying himself as Jesus Christ.
text_zh: 特朗普发布了一张将自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片。

text: Trump lashes out at Pope Leo: Pope Leo is WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy. He talks about “fear” of the Trump Administration, but doesn’t mention the FEAR that the Catholic Church, and all other Christian Organizations, had during COVID when they were arresting priests, ministers, and everybody else, for holding Church Services, even when going outside, and being ten and even twenty feet apart. I like his brother Louis much better than I like him, because Louis is all MAGA. He gets it, and Leo doesn’t! I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s terrible that America attacked Venezuela, a Country that was sending massive amounts of Drugs into the United States and, even worse, emptying their prisons, including murderers, drug dealers, and killers, into our Country. And I don’t want a Pope who criticizes the President of the United States because I’m doing exactly what I was elected, IN A LANDSLIDE, to do, setting Record Low Numbers in Crime, and creating the Greatest Stock Market in History. Leo should be thankful because, as everyone knows, he was a shocking surprise. He wasn’t on any list to be Pope, and was only put there by the Church because he was an American, and they thought that would be the best way to deal with President Donald J. Trump. If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican. Unfortunately, Leo’s Weak on Crime, Weak on Nuclear Weapons, does not sit well with me, nor does the fact that he meets with Obama Sympathizers like David Axelrod, a LOSER from the Left, who is one of those who wanted churchgoers and clerics to be arrested. Leo should get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician. It’s hurting him very badly and, more importantly, it’s hurting the Catholic Church!
text_zh: 特朗普抨击利奥教皇：利奥教皇在犯罪问题上软弱，在外交政策上糟糕透顶。他谈到对特朗普政府的“恐惧”，但没有提到在新冠疫情期间，当他们逮捕神父、牧师和其他所有人，仅仅因为他们举行教堂仪式，甚至在户外保持十英尺甚至二十英尺距离时，天主教会和其他所有基督教组织所感受到的恐惧。我比喜欢他更喜欢他的兄弟路易斯，因为路易斯是彻头彻尾的MAGA。他懂，而利奥不懂！我不想要一个认为伊朗拥有核武器没问题的教皇。我不想要一个认为美国攻击委内瑞拉是可怕之事的教皇，那个国家正在向美国输送大量毒品，更糟糕的是，他们正在清空监狱，包括杀人犯、毒贩和杀手，把他们送进我们的国家。我也不想要一个批评美国总统的教皇，因为我正在做我被选民以压倒性优势选出来要做的事情，即创下犯罪率的历史新低，并创造历史上最伟大的股市。利奥应该心存感激，因为众所周知，他是一个令人震惊的惊喜。他不在任何教皇候选名单上，只是因为他是美国人，教会才把他放在那里，他们认为这是应对唐纳德·J·特朗普总统的最佳方式。如果我不在白宫，利奥就不会在梵蒂冈。不幸的是，利奥在犯罪问题上软弱，在核武器问题上软弱，这让我很不舒服，他与大卫·阿克塞尔罗德这样的奥巴马同情者会面也让我很不舒服，这是一个来自左翼的失败者，他就是那些想要逮捕教堂信徒和神职人员的人之一。利奥应该作为教皇端正自己的行为，运用常识，停止迎合激进左翼，专注于成为一位伟大的教皇，而不是政客。这对他伤害很大，更重要的是，这正在伤害天主教会！

text: Trump: The United States to Blockade Ships Entering or Exiting Iranian Ports on April 13 at 10:00 A.M. ET. Thank you for your attention to this matter!
text_zh: 特朗普：美国将于美东时间4月13日上午10:00封锁进出伊朗港口的船只。感谢您对此事的关注！
